name: nc_no_evidence
description: Step 1.65 deterministic short-circuit (no-evidence gate) — tagged_evidence is None, so the orchestrator ABSTAINS without consulting the LLM. Step D (2026-06-11) redesign: zero evidence is *Unknown*, not a finding. Measured against the human-reviewed gold workbook, the prior confident-Non-Compliant theory was wrong on 88% of the rows it touched (104/118 rule_no_evidence rows disagreed with the reviewer — the largest single error source). Per feedback_precision_over_recall.md (uncertainty writes a needs_review row, never a guess) and feedback_fpr-first (a false Non-Compliant is the worst error), the gate now routes through _abstain: status coerced to None, proposed_status left None (no guess to anchor the reviewer), source='abstain', needs_review=True, review_reason prefixed 'no-evidence:'. The empty stub queue confirms the LLM is not called; any call would raise AssertionError from the stub.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization assigns account managers for information system accounts.
ccis_row.procedures: Examine evidence of designated account managers.
